question: Find the Iowa counties met the following criteria in the year from 2017-2022 that has the highest total daily census records from Allegheny County Jail.9%, biofuel distribution above 12%, and personal income above $4 billion. Compare the 2020 census populations of their county seats and report the population of the county seat for the most populous county. Only report the population number in `Number` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Counting records by year from census_date for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 1202002 in 2019.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total daily census records from Allegheny County Jail? (Use census_date to derive year; count records by year and select the maximum.)

2.fact: In December 2019, 23 Iowa counties had unemployment rates above 2.9%, including Black Hawk County (3.2%) and Scott County (3.3%). Among Iowa counties with personal income above $4B and biofuel distribution above 12%, only Black Hawk and Scott had unemployment above 2.9% (Dallas had 1.9%, Polk had 2.6%, Pottawattamie had 2.4%, Woodbury had 2.7%).
2.subquestion: Which Iowa counties had December <node_1 answer> unemployment rate above 2.9%?

3.fact: In 2019, 47 Iowa counties had biofuel distribution above 12%, including Black Hawk County (13.69%) and Scott County (16.77%). Dallas (12.98%), Polk (13.53%), Pottawattamie (22.67%), and Woodbury (16.61%) also exceeded 12%, but Dubuque (10.99%), Johnson (9.42%), Linn (11.7%), and Story (11.63%) did not.
3.subquestion: Which Iowa counties had biofuel distribution above 12% in <node_1 answer>?

4.fact: In 2019, Black Hawk County had $5.924 billion in personal income and Scott County had $9.367 billion. Other counties exceeding $4 billion included Dallas ($6.519B), Dubuque ($4.901B), Johnson ($8.206B), Linn ($12.08B), Polk ($26.3B), Pottawattamie ($4.206B), Story ($4.221B), and Woodbury ($4.605B).
4.subquestion: Which Iowa counties had personal income above $4 billion in <node_1 answer>?

5.fact: Black Hawk County's county seat is Waterloo. The county was formed on February 17, 1853, from sections of Buchanan County.
5.subquestion: What is the county seat of Black Hawk County (from <intersection of nodes 2-4>)?

6.fact: Scott County's county seat is Davenport. The county was established by the Wisconsin territorial legislature in 1837.
6.subquestion: What is the county seat of Scott County (from <intersection of nodes 2-4>)?

7.fact: Waterloo is a city in and the county seat of Black Hawk County, Iowa. It had a population of 67,314 at the 2020 census, making it the eighth-most populous city in Iowa.
7.subquestion: What was the 2020 census population of Waterloo (the county seat of <node_5 source county>)?

8.fact: Davenport is a city in Scott County, Iowa, and its county seat. It had a population of 101,724 as of the 2020 census, making it Iowa's third-most populous city.
8.subquestion: What was the 2020 census population of Davenport (the county seat of <node_6 source county>)?

9.fact: Scott County had a population of 172,943 in July 2019.
9.subquestion: What was the July <node_1 answer> population of Scott County (the county whose seat <comparative of nodes 7-8: Davenport with 101,724 > Waterloo with 67,314>)?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with highest total daily jail census records (2017-2022) -> 2019
Node 2: Unemployment >2.9% in Dec 2019 -> {Black Hawk, Scott, ...}
Node 3: Biofuel distribution >12% in 2019 -> {Black Hawk, Scott, ...}
Node 4: Personal income >$4B in 2019 -> {Black Hawk, Scott, Dallas, ...}
Node 5: Black Hawk County -> county seat is Waterloo
Node 6: Scott County -> county seat is Davenport
Comparative: 101,724 > 67,314 -> Davenport is larger -> Scott County selected
